element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Climbing out of teleport pond, navigating initial terrain
Avoiding creatures without weapons before capture
Traversing prison complex with alien companion
Standard fire, force field blocking, charged shots
Blocking enemy projectiles and environmental hazards
Breaking through force fields and destructible walls
Situation-specific actions like rocking cages, traversing caves
Underwater navigation with oxygen depletion tracking
Confrontation with alien captor, highest stakes combat

typical_relief_triggers: Progression to new area after hazard gauntlet
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cinematic escalation with interspersed safe traversal; tension builds from evasion-only phase through armed conflict to climactic tower assault. Checkpoint frequency moderates spike severity.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like evasion and basic platforming; unarmed vulnerability creates tension despite mechanical simplicity
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduces laser pistol trinity (standard/field/charge); enemy parity requires tactical gun mode switching and environmental use; puzzle complexity increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Prison complex, cave system, tower navigation; sustained combat encounters with armed aliens; climactic tower assault with wounded state narrative stakes
notable_spikes: First armed alien encounter (transition from evasion to combat)
Multi-stage prison escape with coordinated Buddy mechanics
Oxygen management during cave swimming sequences
Final tower confrontation with wounded protagonist mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: Early alien world surface: navigate diverse fauna threats without weapons, establishing evasion core mechanic before weaponization
Prison complex and subsequent environments use forward-moving checkpoint sequences that prevent backtracking and create narrative momentum
Caves, submerged sections, and tower use physics (water, gravity, collapsing structures) as pacing punctuation and puzzle gates
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Cave system with swimming oxygen mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Post-escape sequences require Buddy cooperation for progression; death of either character ends run, creating shared vulnerability
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mid-game onward prison and cave traversal

notable_level_patterns.description: Tower structure channels combat toward top; narrative wounding and dragon escape provide cinematic finale rather than gameplay reset
